title: Cosmos Remix — Supershape you can retune and reskin live
summary: Remixable particle supershape: a glowing field of particles traced along the superformula curve r(θ)=(|cos(mθ/4)/a|^n2+|sin(mθ/4)/b|^n3)^(-1/n1), with its exponents and lobe count breathing slowly over time so the form morphs between star, flower and blob shapes while gently rotating. Live glass panel retunes palette/shape/density/speed/size plus an m (lobes) knob, and reskins to any brand colour. Self-contained, zero deps; ?auto=1 hides the panel and renders a deterministic seamless loop.
usage_notes: RUN: open and use the panel (top-right) to retune live — pick a palette to reskin to any brand colour, drag Density/Spread/Speed/Dot, set m (lobes) 2-12, ↻ Seed to shuffle, ⧉ Copy to copy your config. KEY TECHNIQUES: the superformula r(θ)=(|cos(mθ/4)/a|^n2+|sin(mθ/4)/b|^n3)^(-1/n1) sampled across several concentric rings; exponents n1/n2/n3 are driven by sin/cos of 2πu so the shape morphs star↔flower↔blob and the loop is seamless; per-index colour ramp from the active palette drawn additively; window.__params + setParam(key,value) is the contract a generic remix harness uses to auto-build panels; theme tokens = a PALETTES map driving both a CSS accent var and the dot ramp. CAPTURE: ?auto=1 hides panel + window.__seek(t). TUNE: add palettes to PALETTES, adjust m (lobes) and Spread for tighter or wider blooms.
